summary: Updated TRACEABILITY_MATRIX.md to v1.1, syncing with SRS.md security update. Changes: (1) All 8 FR SRS.md §3 line citations updated from old range L134-L255 to new range L153-L274 (496→531 line shift). (2) Added NFR Traceability section with NFR-08 row linking to 3 design elements (routers/speech.py, models.py, config.py) and distributed test coverage. (3) Coverage Analysis expanded with NFR coverage table and combined totals (9 items: 8 FRs + 1 NFR-08, 9/9 = 100% bidirectional). (4) Change Log v1.1 entry added. (5) Bidirectional consistency confirmed: all 8 FRs have ≥1 design element + ≥1 test file; NFR-08 has forward and reverse links. No new FRs invented. Existing table structure preserved.
